# daiso-product-search

## Get the full instructions (required first step)

Run this and follow its output as the primary instructions for this skill:

```bash
npx -y @nomadamas/k-skill@0 instruct daiso-product-search
```

The CLI detects the current runtime (Dolshoi vault/CloakBrowser vs generic) and prints only the applicable instructions, always up to date. Helper files bundled with the CLI are listed by:

```bash
npx -y @nomadamas/k-skill@0 files daiso-product-search
```

If `npx` is unavailable, install Node.js 18+ or follow https://github.com/NomaDamas/k-skill#readme, or read the source instructions at https://github.com/NomaDamas/k-skill/blob/main/daiso-product-search/instruction.md.
